decisions.description: Designed to check if the parent product has a managed service related to it. If so, the Has Managed Service checkbox needs to be checked and passed to the parent asset which represents the parent product.
decisions.name: Managed_Service_Exists_Crossroad
decisions.label: Managed Service Exists Crossroad

decisions.description: Designed to check if the parent product has a managed service related to it. If so, the Has Managed Service checkbox needs to be checked and passed to the parent asset which represents the parent product.

decisions.label: Managed Service Exists Crossroad

fields.name: Accessories_Text
fields.fieldText:
Ingoing Asset

Please choose an accessory below:

fields.name: Accessories_Text_0
fields.fieldText:
Ingoing Asset


Please choose an accessory below:

fields.name: Accessory_Not_Found_Text
fields.fieldText:
This product has no accessories related to it.


In case you want to create a new accessory use the "New Accesory" toggle.


In case you do not want to add a new accessory click the "Continue" button.

fields.name: Accessory_Not_Found_Text_0
fields.fieldText:
This product has no accessories related to it.


In case you want to create a new accessory use the "New Accesory" toggle.


In case you do not want to add a new accessory click the "Continue" button.

fields.name: IngoingAssetMarker1
fields.fieldText: Ingoing Asset

fields.name: Product_Choice_Text
fields.fieldText: What would you like to choose, a parent product or an accessory?

fields.name: IngoingAssetMarker2
fields.fieldText: Ingoing Asset

fields.name: Product_Text_0
fields.fieldText: Please choose the product and its quantity that will replace the chosen asset:

fields.name: Product_Quantity_0
fields.fieldText: Product Quantity

fields.name: Add_Accessory_To_Parent
fields.fieldText: Do you want to add an accessory?

fields.name: DeliveryAddress5
fields.fieldText: Delivery Address

fields.name: Location_At_Site
fields.fieldText: Location At Site

fields.name: Delivery_Date
fields.fieldText: Delivery Date

fields.name: Delivery_Address
fields.fieldText: If the selected site is not the delivery address, please enter this using the Address fields below.

fields.name: Address_Text_0
fields.fieldText: Do you have the delivery and collection details?

fields.name: DeliveryAddress6
fields.fieldText: Delivery Address

fields.name: Location_At_Site_Acc
fields.fieldText: Location At Site

fields.name: Delivery_Date_0
fields.fieldText: Delivery Date

fields.name: DeliveryAddress1
fields.fieldText: If the selected site is not the delivery address, please enter this using the Address fields below.

fields.name: CollectionAddress
fields.fieldText: Collection Address

fields.name: Collection_Date
fields.fieldText: Collection Date

fields.name: CollectionAddress2
fields.fieldText: Collection Address

fields.name: DeliveryAddress3
fields.fieldText: If the selected site is not the collection address, please enter this using the address fields below.

screens.name: Display_Screen_For_Accessory_Not_Found
screens.label: Display Screen For Accessory Not Found

fields.name: Not_An_Accessory_Text
fields.fieldText: Chosen product is not an accessory. Please click "Continue" to go back to the main screen.

fields.name: ErrorText
fields.fieldText:
Error!


{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: Managed_Service_Not_Found_Text
fields.fieldText:
This product has no managed service related to it.


In case you want to create a new managed service use the "New Managed Service" toggle.


In case you do not want to add a new accessory click the "Continue" button.

fields.name: Managed_Service_Not_Found_Text_0
fields.fieldText:
This product has no managed service related to it.


In case you want to create a new managed service use the "New Managed Service" toggle.


In case you do not want to add a new accessory click the "Continue" button.

fields.name: Managed_Service_Text
fields.fieldText:
Ingoing Asset


Do you want to add a managed service?

fields.name: Managed_Service_Text_0
fields.fieldText: Do you want to add a managed service?

fields.name: Managed_Services_Text
fields.fieldText:
Ingoing Asset


Please choose managed service below:

fields.name: Managed_Services_Text_0
fields.fieldText:
Ingoing Asset

Please choose managed service below:

fields.name: New_Product_Text
fields.fieldText:
Would you like to add a new product?


To exit the process click on the "Continue/Finish" button without using the toggle.

fields.name: New_Product_Text_0
fields.fieldText:
Would you like to add a new product?


To exit the process click on the "Continue/Finish" button without using the toggle.

fields.name: No_Parent_Assets_Text
fields.fieldText:
Opportunity's account does not have any parent assets related to it.


Click "Exit" to exit the process.

fields.name: OutgoingAssetMarker
fields.fieldText: Outgoing Asset

fields.name: Parent_Asset_Text
fields.fieldText: Please choose a parent asset related to the opportunity's account:

fields.name: Product_Not_Parent_Text
fields.fieldText: Chosen product is not a parent product. Please choose a product again by clicking the "Choose Parent Product" button.

fields.name: IngoingAssetMarker3
fields.fieldText: Ingoing Asset

fields.name: Product_Text
fields.fieldText: Please choose the product and its quantity that will replace the chosen asset:

fields.name: Product_Quantity
fields.fieldText: Product Quantity

variables.description:
The purpose of having separate collections, and this final collection is to understand what each variable will have and what will be passed to this final variable. The problem is that one can select multiple parent products without leaving the flow which means that one cannot loop over all opportunity products and update their addresses, one has to loop ovver the products that are related to the starting product only.
Small opportunity collections - every collection that starts with All_New_Opportunity_Products.
variables.name: All_New_Opportunity_Products

variables.description:
The purpose of having separate collections, and this final collection is to understand what each variable will have and what will be passed to this final variable. The problem is that one can select multiple parent products without leaving the flow which means that one cannot loop over all opportunity products and update their addresses, one has to loop ovver the products that are related to the starting product only.
Small product group collections - every collection that starts with All_New_Product_Groups.
variables.name: All_New_Product_Groups

variables.description: Variable solely used to store address information, and pass it to other records (parent product, managed services, and accessories)
variables.name: New_Address
